{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20754_1
|class_id=20754
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20754_2
|fame=17
|art=12
|fth=31
|civ=17
|tech=13
|ss1=All ELMT RES +1<br>Per Partner you have, Snail DEF +2<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=All ELMT RES +2<br>Per Partner you have, Snail DEF +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=All ELMT RES +3<br>Per Partner you have, Snail DEF +4<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=All ELMT RES +3<br>Per Partner you have, Snail DEF +4<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=All ELMT RES +3<br>Per Partner you have, Snail DEF +4<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
